title: Let’s Spend It Together Now
detail_text: <:th_ch0102/>Shioriko-chan, thank you for the message during the countdown live. It really helped us out<:dt_line_end/><:th_ch0210/>I’m glad to hear that. I also enjoyed spending new years’ eve while watching an Aqours live<:dt_line_end/><:th_ch0102/>Fufu. Hey, how was your new year? I went with everyone else on our first shrine visit right after the live. The entire time it felt like I was in a dream, it was so much fun....<:dt_line_end/><:th_ch0210/>I.... spent the new year welcoming our customers.  But, watching the countdown live powered me up, so I was able to help out with all I got<:dt_line_end/><:th_ch0102/>You spent all day helping....?<:dt_line_end/><:th_ch0210/>P-, please don’t make that face. It’s normal like this for every year for my family, and I’m free after the first three days too!<:dt_line_end/><:th_ch0102/>Have you done your first shrine visit? Did you eat candy apples from the stalls along your way to the shrine?<:dt_line_end/><:th_ch0210/>Umm.... I did the shrine visit with my family<:dt_line_end/><:th_ch0102/>Then, would you go with me to the shopping district right now? A detour is basically a part of the first shrine visit, you know! There’s a place that sells croquette that’s fried on the spot, it’s really delicious~<:dt_line_end/><:th_ch0210/>Eh? Umm, Riko-san....?<:dt_line_end/><:th_ch0102/>That’s right, let’s get Chika-chan and You-chan too. Spend the new year with us today!<:dt_line_end/><:th_ch0000/>Translated by SIFAStheatre and Idol Story<:dt_line_end/>
